title: docling
summary: Docling understands document intelligence beyond extraction — it combines ML-based layout understanding (Heron model, GraniteDocling VLM), multi-format parsing (PDF+DOCX+PPTX+audio+images+LaTeX), structured information extraction, and gen AI ecosystem integration (LangChain, LlamaIndex, MCP server) into a unified DoclingDocument representation.  The arXiv paper (2408.
creator_view: Docling understands document intelligence beyond extraction — it combines ML-based layout understanding (Heron model, GraniteDocling VLM), multi-format parsing (PDF+DOCX+PPTX+audio+images+LaTeX), structured information extraction, and gen AI ecosystem integration (LangChain, LlamaIndex, MCP server) into a unified DoclingDocument representation. The arXiv paper (2408.09869) and IBM Research backing signal deep academic rigor behind the engineering.
